positive: A mystical forest clearing bathed in ethereal dawn light, featuring a central, stylized watercolor illustration of a majestic mountain silhouette rising above a bioluminescent pond. The flora includes hyper-detailed fern fronds and luminous, stylized mushrooms, all rendered with clean linework and vibrant jewel-toned gradients (sapphire, emerald, amethyst). The composition must be perfectly centered and optimized for fabric printing, utilizing negative space for maximum impact. Aesthetic style: Japanese woodblock print meets modern scientific illustration, clean edges, high contrast, graphic elements.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, smudged, messy, photographic, depth of field
